zones.description: Kosi and Gandak rivers at 91% capacity. Heavy upstream rainfall in Nepal contributing to rapid rise. Low-lying districts under imminent flood threat.
zones.recommended_action: Immediate evacuation of low-lying areas. Pre-position NDRF teams.
zones.sms_preview: EMERGENCY: Extreme Flood Warning for Bihar. Immediate evacuation in low-lying areas. Contact NDRF helpline: 011-24363260.
zones.dashboard_notification: High Risk Alert: Severe weather in Bihar. Emergency protocols required.
recommended_actions: Activate district emergency response team
Move people from low-lying areas
Prepare relief shelters
Notify farmers and local authorities

zones.description: Cloudburst risk elevated in Chamoli and Rudraprayag districts. Alaknanda river level rising rapidly. Landslide probability high on NH-58 corridor.
zones.recommended_action: Close mountain highways. Evacuate riverbank settlements. Alert SDRF.
zones.sms_preview: ALERT: Cloudburst and landslide risk in Uttarakhand. Avoid travel on mountain roads. Move to high ground immediately.
zones.dashboard_notification: High Risk Alert: Flood and landslide risk in Uttarakhand. Road closures advised.
recommended_actions: Close NH-58 and NH-7 to civilian traffic
Evacuate all riverside settlements in Chamoli
Pre-position SDRF at Joshimath and Gopeshwar
Issue tourist advisory to avoid Char Dham route

zones.description: Brahmaputra river breaching embankments in 3 districts. Morigaon and Jorhat severely affected. Over 1.8 million people in flood-prone belts at risk.
zones.recommended_action: Open relief camps. Coordinate with State Disaster Management Authority.
zones.sms_preview: ALERT: Severe flooding in Assam. Move to relief camps immediately. SDMA helpline: 1070.
zones.dashboard_notification: High Risk Alert: Brahmaputra embankment breach risk in Assam. Relief camps activated.
recommended_actions: Open 120 relief camps across affected districts
Deploy NDRF and boat rescue teams
Issue evacuation orders for Majuli island
Coordinate with Indian Army for relief operations

zones.description: Surface temperatures recorded at 48-51°C. Extreme heat advisory active for 6 western Rajasthan districts. Heat stroke risk critical for outdoor workers and livestock.
zones.recommended_action: Issue heat advisory. Open cooling centres. Restrict outdoor labour 10am–5pm.
zones.sms_preview: HEAT ALERT: Extreme heatwave in Rajasthan. Avoid going out 10am-5pm. Drink water. Visit nearest cooling centre.
zones.dashboard_notification: High Risk Alert: Heatwave in Rajasthan. Surface temp exceeding 49°C. Cooling centres activated.
recommended_actions: Open cooling centres in all 6 affected districts
Restrict outdoor labour between 10am and 5pm
Distribute ORS packets and drinking water
Alert hospitals to prepare for heat stroke cases

zones.description: Low pressure system in Bay of Bengal intensifying. Likely to make landfall near Puri-Konark coastline as Category 1 cyclone. Wind speeds 80-100 kmph expected.
zones.recommended_action: Evacuate coastal villages. Suspend fishing operations. Pre-position rescue teams.
zones.sms_preview: CYCLONE WATCH: Bay of Bengal storm approaching Odisha coast. Fishermen must return to shore. Coastal residents move inland.
zones.dashboard_notification: Moderate Risk Alert: Cyclone watch active for Odisha coast. Landfall possible in 60 hours.
recommended_actions: Evacuate all villages within 5 km of coastline
Halt all fishing activity and bring boats ashore
Reinforce cyclone shelters in Puri and Konark
Put ODRAF and NDRF on high alert

zones.description: Heavy monsoon rainfall expected over central Kerala. Periyar river at 72% capacity. Orange alert issued for Ernakulam, Thrissur and Idukki districts.
zones.recommended_action: Monitor river levels. Issue orange alert advisory. Prepare evacuation plans.
zones.sms_preview: ORANGE ALERT: Heavy rain expected in Kerala. Stay alert. Avoid travel near rivers and low-lying roads.
zones.dashboard_notification: Moderate Risk Alert: Orange flood alert in Kerala. Monitor river levels closely.
recommended_actions: Monitor Periyar and Chalakudy river levels every 4 hours
Prepare pre-emptive evacuation for Aluva riverbank areas
Issue advisory for landslide-prone areas in Idukki
Alert district collectors for rapid response

zones.description: Arabian Sea cyclonic circulation strengthening. Possible landfall near Kutch-Saurashtra coastline. Wind gusts up to 90 kmph. Storm surge of 1.5–2 m expected.
zones.recommended_action: Fishermen advisory issued. Coastal community preparedness activated.
zones.sms_preview: CYCLONE ADVISORY: Gujarat coast on watch. Fishermen must not venture into sea. Coastal residents stay alert.
zones.dashboard_notification: Moderate Risk Alert: Cyclone advisory for Gujarat coast. Fishermen and coastal communities alerted.
recommended_actions: Issue red alert for Kutch and Devbhumi Dwarka fishermen
Pre-position NDRF teams at Bhuj and Gandhidham
Inspect and reinforce coastal embankments
Coordinate with Indian Coast Guard for sea rescue
